text: Let me see if I have the scenario correctly and I'll repeat my version of it. We would hang garlic, fresh cut garlic, and the area of the wet bar and the area of the bedroom that is adjacent to the kitchen area. We would solve all window sills and all outer wall door sills and then sprinkle bless water from our fingers on all of the solid areas. We would then say appropriate words to bid farewell to lower astral. Those words I'm not sure of. I am your grasp of our suggestions is good. We note that the assault before in the straight line with no gaps. There are various ritual words of a blessing and farewell to entities such as you are. Are we moving? We might suggest the following when the assault is laid. You may repeat, we appraise the one, a creator, of which a gave a two salt the ability to enable. Those friends to which we wish to bid a farewell to find a new home. As thee a water is sprinkled. You may say, We give a thanks to the one, a creator, for the gift of a water. Over it the creator moves its hand and stirs its will to be done. The hanging of the cut, a garlic, and may be accompanied by the words we appraise the one creator for the gift of garlic and bless its ability to offer to those friends to whom we wish to bid farewell, the arrow which points a there a way of egress. A win a thee, a sweeping is a done. You may a say a we a praise a be one a creator and give a thanksgiving for the spiritual cleanliness of this a dwelling, a place. As a the a garlic is a burned a you may a say. We give a thanks to the one creator for the gift of spiritual cleanliness in our dwelling place and seal the departure of all those who have left by this exit, by the consuming of this substance.
